blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 197 ft. Looking ahead, 37 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
